meta.title: Lattice Model Node Companion
meta.schema: state / control / transform / invariant / drift / coherence / score
meta.boundary: Local visual research companion. No external model calls, no clinical, remediation, or physics claim by itself.

nodes.label: Mirror Architecture
nodes.description: Unified architecture layer that maps state, control, transform, invariant, drift, coherence, and score across domains.

nodes.label: Source Mirror Pattern
nodes.description: The recurring cross-scale pattern tracked through formal systems, matter, dynamics, biology, cosmic systems, AI hidden states, and companion engines.

nodes.label: Nest 1: Formal Systems
nodes.description: Linear algebra, symmetries, invariants, encoded circuit states, and formal score grammar.

nodes.label: Linear Algebra
nodes.description: Vector spaces, bases, transforms, projections, eigensystems, norms, and encoded state representations.

nodes.label: Symmetry + Invariant
nodes.description: Conservation under transformation: the formal source of balance, stable relation, and drift detection.

nodes.label: Encoded Circuit State
nodes.description: AI geometry expressed as circuit-state structure before hardware execution.

nodes.label: Nest 2: Structured Matter
nodes.description: Elements, molecules, materials, minerals, food chemistry, water, and reaction pathways.

nodes.label: Elements
nodes.description: Periodic families, shell structure, valence, electronegativity, oxidation states, and isotope classes.

nodes.label: Hydrogen
nodes.description: Clean bridge from element / isotope structure into fusion and solar systems.

nodes.label: Oxygen / Redox
nodes.description: O2, oxidation state, electron transfer, dissolved oxygen, reactive species, metabolism, fire, and remediation controls.

nodes.label: H2O / Water
nodes.description: Bond angle, polarity, hydrogen bonding, hydration shells, solvent behavior, and biological bridge.

nodes.label: Minerals
nodes.description: Lattice, composition, surfaces, weathering, ion exchange, clays, oxides, and remediation interfaces.

nodes.label: Food Chemistry
nodes.description: Proteins, carbs, fats, vitamins, minerals, fiber, hydration, and food-state transforms before metabolism.

nodes.label: Proteins
nodes.description: Amino-acid sequence, folding, charge, functional motifs, digestion products, and cell-facing signaling inputs.

nodes.label: Carbs + Fats
nodes.description: Sugar polymers, starch, fiber, lipid chains, saturation, membrane precursors, and energy substrate classes.

nodes.label: Vitamins + Nutrients
nodes.description: Micronutrient classes, mineral cofactors, solubility, redox roles, methylation supports, and deficiency / excess drift.

nodes.label: PFAS / Pharma / Microplastics
nodes.description: Persistent contaminant families mapped by bond topology, safe endpoints, and bad-descendant penalties.

nodes.label: Organic Functional Groups
nodes.description: Alcohols, acids, amines, aromatics, carbonyls, fluorinated chains, bond order, heteroatom motifs, and reactivity families.

nodes.label: Biomolecular Primitives
nodes.description: Amino acids, nucleotides, lipids, sugars, backbone constraints, charge / polarity, and chemistry-to-biology bridge rows.

nodes.label: Polymers / Plastics
nodes.description: Polymer repeat units, chain classes, PET, polyethylene, microplastic fragments, degradation paths, and safe endpoint scoring.

nodes.label: Electrochemistry
nodes.description: Ions, batteries, conductivity, membranes, charge transfer, redox pairs, and bounded current / solution behavior.

nodes.label: Catalysis / Conditions
nodes.description: Heat, pH, light, plasma, mineral surfaces, enzymes, catalysts, endpoint selectivity, and declared-condition controls.

nodes.label: Spectral Signatures
nodes.description: IR, Raman, THz, NMR, mass spec, peak families, mode assignment, baseline controls, and repeatable matter readouts.

nodes.label: Environmental Fate
nodes.description: Soil, water, leaching, bioaccumulation, transport paths, transformation products, and risk endpoint tracking.

nodes.label: Materials / Semiconductors
nodes.description: Crystals, defects, band structure, phonons, lattice stability, unit cells, and engineered device surfaces.

nodes.label: Nest 3: Classical Coherence
nodes.description: Oscillators, resonance, EMF, plasma, fire, fusion, spectral comparators, phase-lock, and field dynamics.

nodes.label: Terahertz
nodes.description: Spectral pattern bridge into water, molecules, cells, DNA, and later measured biological response.

nodes.label: Fire + Plasma
nodes.description: Combustion, ionized matter, radicals, fields, surface activation, byproducts, and bounded controls.

nodes.label: Fusion + Solar
nodes.description: Hydrogen isotope state, plasma confinement, reaction channel, solar output, and larger convergence systems.

nodes.label: Nest 4: Biology
nodes.description: HRV, EEG, physiology, cells, genome, proteome, metabolism, timing channels, and living comparator classes.

nodes.label: HRV + EEG
nodes.status: HRV first matrix complete / EEG planned

nodes.label: Cells + Genome
nodes.description: DNA, epigenome, transcriptome, proteome, signaling, membranes, mitochondria, repair, and drift modes.

nodes.label: Metabolism

nodes.label: Nest 5: Convergence
nodes.description: Multi-class convergence matrix across formal systems, matter, coherence, biology, ecology, and engineered systems.

nodes.label: Ecosystem / Planet

nodes.label: NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo
nodes.description: Future physics AI adapter for field systems, PDE-like dynamics, plasma, fluids, resonance, and engineered physics surfaces.

nodes.label: MatterGen / MatGL / CHGNet / MACE
nodes.description: Future materials and atomistic graph adapters for molecules, crystals, material candidates, and property surfaces.

nodes.label: RDKit / ASE / pymatgen / FairChem
nodes.description: Future toolkit bridge for molecules, atomistic structures, crystals, catalysts, and reaction-surface comparators.

nodes.label: Engine 02: Nest 2 Matter
nodes.description: Pure-Python structured-matter engine scoring element-family recovery, molecular graph validity, H2O motif structure, minerals, redox rows, nutrition chemistry, and contaminant bad-descendant behavior.

nodes.label: Auxiliary Math
nodes.description: Graph theory, topology, geometry, probability, information theory, dynamical systems, optimization, statistics, numerical computation, spectral methods, and control theory.

nodes.label: Space / Time / Cycles
nodes.description: Geometry and periodicity become motion, phase, rotation, orbit, rhythm, and time-evolution comparators.

nodes.label: Gases / Liquids / Phases
nodes.description: Matter state becomes thermodynamics, fluid dynamics, pressure, temperature, viscosity, phase transition, and flow coherence.

nodes.label: Gravity / Orbits
nodes.description: Mass distribution, acceleration, orbit, resonance, rotation, and gravitational coherence under perturbation.

nodes.label: Stars / Planets
nodes.description: Stars and planets combine matter, gravity, plasma, radiation, orbit, atmosphere, geology, water, and cycles into convergence systems.

nodes.label: Dark-Matter Observables
nodes.description: Safe comparator lane for rotation curves, lensing, mass discrepancy, and structure formation observables without overclaiming direct substance measurement.

nodes.label: Cosmic Web / Universe
nodes.description: Galaxy clusters, filaments, voids, expansion, background radiation, and large-scale structure as universe-scale convergence.

nodes.label: Unified Mirror Proof
nodes.description: The continuous evidence ladder linking AI measurement, encoded circuits, hardware, biology, formal math, matter, dynamics, cosmic convergence, and local engines.

nodes.label: Nest 1 Expanded Formal
nodes.description: Topology, topography, graph theory, geometry, dynamics, probability, information theory, optimization, statistics, numerical computation, spectral methods, control, and compositional math.

nodes.label: Nest 1 Real Closeout
nodes.description: Nest 1 is no longer only grammar: LA/GEO, STAT/PROB, NUM/GRP, TOPOG, DYN, INFO/TENSOR, GRAPH-1, GEO-2, and DYN-2 have real support; OPT/CAT are limited; GRAPH-2, CTRL, and GAME need new data or protocol.

nodes.label: TOP-1/2 Invariance
nodes.description: Real V8 point clouds and dense GLM/Hermes late-anchor vectors show topology preservation under context transform. Dense H0 supports invariance in 2/2 models; dense H1 does not support context-topology separation.

nodes.label: Dense TOP Next
nodes.description: Dense trajectory pilot preserved full prompt tokens across all layers for GLM and Hermes. The result supports connectedness invariance, not persistent-loop separation; revisit with reruns or broader prompt density.

nodes.label: Phase 12B HRV Matrix
nodes.description: Mofit HRV runs produced a real biological adapter lane with calm, drift, mirror-coherence, and dance condition classes; strongest current claim is coarse state separation, not clinical biology.

nodes.label: Prototype Lanes
nodes.description: Cross-over precursor technology lanes that show how the Source Mirror Pattern becomes practical build paths before full productization.

nodes.label: PFAS Breakdown Prototype
nodes.description: Persistent contaminant lane for PFAS / pharma / microplastics using bond topology, C-F cleavage targets, byproduct suppression, mass balance, and safe endpoint scoring.

nodes.label: Terahertz Cellular Prototype
nodes.description: Terahertz pattern lane connecting spectral control, water/molecular response, cellular/DNA state movement, measured vectors, and bounded safety controls.

nodes.label: HRV-AI Tuning Prototype
nodes.description: Human-state adapter lane for feeding HRV / later EEG timing signals into AI pacing, routing, user-feedback, and state-fit experiments.

nodes.label: Quantum Insider Buildout
nodes.description: Five-track campaign using one lattice chassis across Airbus, Cleveland Clinic, E.ON, HSBC, and Volkswagen proof surfaces.
